form.formComment: Gelding back from a spell of 22 months. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last preparation 12th of 14 at Ascot in the G2 King Edward VII Stakes June 21 2024 over 2414m, 37 len behind Calandagan with 58kg at $15. First up last campaign third in a small field at Epsom Downs in the LR Blue Riband Trl April 23 2024 over 2011m, 1.0 len behind Bellum Justum with 58.5kg at $1.80. Looks forward enough after a recent trial win. Looks all set for a effective return.
